item.title: Jotbook 1.04
item.description:
# Jotbook 1.04
## New - **Automatic updates** — Jotbook now ships with Sparkle. It checks for a new release on launch and once a day after that, and installs updates silently the next time you quit and reopen the app. No more right-click → Open dance for future updates. - **About section in Settings** — a new **About** panel shows the current version and build, toggles automatic update checks, offers a **Check for Updates…** button, and links out to the full release history on GitHub. - **Check for Updates… menu item** — added to the menubar right-click menu so you can pull the latest release on demand without opening Settings.
## Install Download `Jotbook-1.04.dmg`, open it, drag Jotbook to Applications. First launch: right-click → Open, then System Settings → Privacy & Security → Open Anyway (authenticate with Touch ID), then Open in the final dialog.
